The '''arrak snake''' was an avian reptile native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. They fed on [[shamarok flitter]]s.

The arrak snake had green eyes and brightly-colored feathered scales. They had small wings, which allowed them to live among the [[Bafforr tree]]s in the canopies of Ithor's jungles. Arrak snakes communicated through a complex, musical hooting call.

A [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]] named [[Nuri]] transformed into an arrak snake while fighting [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and tried to constrict him before being struck in the chin by his [[Vibroblade/Legends|Vibroblade]] on a vulnerable area, and changing into a [[Dinko (creature)|dinko]] and a [[Fefze beetle]].<ref name="New Threat">''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]''</ref>
